figures.caption: Figure 8. The first plot shows the tip-mass position obtained from our experiment and the numerical simulation in Example 1, while the second plot shows the error between these two positions. The maximum error is about 3mm (i.e. 1% of the net dispacement of the tip-mass).
Figure 1. Experimental setup of a non-uniform moving cantilever Euler-Bernoulli beam with a tip-mass, see Section 6 for details.
